LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-23-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS GREENBOX POS AND GREENBOX POS, LLC'S MOTION TO QUASH PLAINTIFFS SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS TO EAZE TECHNOLOGIES INC, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF JUNE 4, 2020 ORDER STAYING PROCEEDINGS PENDING HEARING ON MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE MOVING PARTIES MAY RENOTICE THE MATTER FOR HEARING IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, JUL-21-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GREENBOX POS, GREENBOX POS, LLC'S MOTION TO QUASH PLAINTIFFS SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS TO EAZE TECHNOLOGIES INC. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION TO QUASH THE SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM WILL BE DENIED WITH THE PROVISO THAT THE NAMES OF INDIVIDUAL CUSTOMERS AND NON-CORPORATE DISPENSARIES BE REDACTED. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: SHEILA PHAM, CSR NO. 13293; TEL: 213-623-5005; EMAIL: SFDEPO@VERITEXT.COM (302/JPT)

Defendants Greenbox Pos And Greenbox Pos Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Subpoena For Production Of Business Records To Eaze Technologies Inc
Off Calendar Jul-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. DAVID HOUSKA, Esq. of COOLEY LLP (Tel: 415-693-2000) for Plaintiffs DCSM, INC.; INDIGO RIVER, LLC; RYAN BURNS COLLECTIVE, INC.; and SOAR COLLECTIVE, INC.
Attys. AARON D. SADOCK, Esq. of PANAKOS LAW, APC (Tel: 619-800-0529) of GEORGE D. RIKOS, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF GEORGE RIKOS (Tel: 858-876-5201) for DEFENDANTS GREENBOX POS and GREENBOX POS, LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GREENBOX POS, GREENBOX POS, LLC'S Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Subpoena For Production Of Business Records To Eaze Technologies Inc.

The parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. The parties and judge pro tem appearing remotely authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation form on their behalf.

The Court notes it did not receive a request for hearing, but waives this failure as defense counsel are not local.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion to quash the subpoena duces tecum will be denied with the proviso that the names of individual customers and non-corporate dispensaries be redacted.

The Court will prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR No. 13293; Tel: 213-623-5005; Email: sfdepo@veritext.com (302/JPT)

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS GREENBOX POS AND GREENBOX POS, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Defendants GreenBox POS and Greenbox POS, LLC's motion to compel arbitration is denied, and the previously entered stay is dissolved.
